description.value:
The members of this ancient clan are owners of the sacred burial places from the Hidden Sealed Hills Village, and because of this and other secret arrangements made with the High Council rulers, they are said to have great amounts of resources and relics stored in their hideouts. Besides that, the clan members from Kuiarasu clan seem to have little contact with the rest of the village, always in the shadows, taking distance from the political affairs of the village, apparently.

Source: Mechanics/Character_Options/Occupations/Community Compendium/Kuiarasu Clan.md

Category: Community Compendium

Prerequisite: Age 8+

Class Skills: Select 2 from Bluff, Chakra Control, Craft (Chemical), Diplomacy, Hide, Intimidate, Knowledge (Ninja lore), Knowledge (the Underworld), Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Treat Injury.

Feat: Select one from Advanced Bloodline (Kuiarasu Clan Bloodline, Soul Eater), Genin, Genius Nin, Improved Chakra Pool, Iron Will, Medical Expert, Will over Flesh.

Wealth Bonus Increase: +2

Reputation Bonus Increase: +1

featOptions: Advanced Bloodline (Kuiarasu Clan Bloodline, Soul Eater)
